evidenceSummary: Co-accused in 3 theft FIRs (KA/2024/8821, KA/2025/1102, KA/2025/3394). Suresh acts as Ravi's regular getaway driver.
Informant tip connects Ravi to Anil D'Souza's jewelry robbery network. Ravi allegedly served as lookout in KA/2026/00103.
Known territorial rivalry. Anil D'Souza's operations in Hubballi-Dharwad overlapped with Ganesh Naik's influence area. Altercation reported in 2025.
Mohammed Farooq's cyber fraud proceeds suspected to fund Lakshmi Devi's drug distribution. Money trail under investigation.
Phone records show 12 calls between Ravi Kumar and Lakshmi Devi in the month before KA/2026/00104. Nature of association unclear.
